subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Whose purpose hath been the salvation and preservation of His servants, and Whose laws and commandments are each a guardian [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را سزا که قصدش نجات و حفظ عباد بوده و احکام و اوامرش هر یک حارس و
